hooks.prompt: Review what just happened in the conversation. Did you make a design decision, discover a constraint, choose a pattern, learn something non-obvious about the project, or produce context that would help another agent working on this project? Only consider things NOT already captured in the code itself — the 'why', not the 'what'. If yes, respond with 'block' and a brief note of what should be written to Seam. If nothing worth sharing, respond with 'approve'.
